verdict_reason: Bootstrap smoke synthetic verdict. NOT a Codex-generated review; it is a smoke-test artifact that exercises the gate's HMAC + schema + canonical-pin + diff_sha256 validation paths. Real Codex review fires on first non-bootstrap commit (decision #10 runner online).
rationale: Smoke task is a no-op substrate (single test fixture). The smoke validates the gate plumbing, not feature correctness.
